description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine SWSINT_2, and is implemented by a call to SWSINT_2. Use this API to return switched shunt ‘1’ integer parameters. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, ival = swsint(ibus, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the switched shunt quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Bus IBUS substation number (returned as 0 if bus IBUS is not in a substation).
Bus IBUS bus section number (returned as 0 if bus IBUS is not in a substation).
Number of the node to which the switched shunt is connected (returned as 0 if bus IBUS is not in a substation).
Bus number of regulated bus; zero for none.
Bus number of regulated bus; zero for none.
